SailPoint

We're Hiring

Enterprise Identity Security Platform

Identity Security Cybersecurity Compliance Fortune 500

SailPoint provides unified identity security solutions that help businesses mitigate risk, automate repetitive manual processes, and simplify regulatory compliance. Trusted by half of the Fortune 500 companies, SailPoint's platform enables faster staff onboarding, enhanced security posture, and streamlined identity governance across enterprises.

Company Overview

SailPoint Technologies is a leader in enterprise identity security, providing comprehensive solutions that enable organizations to manage and secure digital identities across their entire technology ecosystem. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in Austin, Texas, the company has grown to become the trusted identity security partner for many of the world's largest and most sophisticated enterprises.

As a publicly traded company on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SAIL), SailPoint serves thousands of customers globally, including approximately half of the Fortune 500. The company's platform addresses the critical challenge of managing who has access to what within complex enterprise environments, helping organizations reduce security risks while improving operational efficiency.

🏆 Market Leadership

SailPoint is recognized as a leader in identity governance and administration (IGA) by major industry analysts. The company's platform is built on decades of identity expertise and continues to evolve with the changing security landscape, incorporating AI and machine learning to address modern identity challenges.

Platform & Solutions

SailPoint Identity Security Cloud

The SailPoint Identity Security Cloud is a unified platform that provides comprehensive identity governance, access management, and privileged access management capabilities. Built on a modern, cloud-native architecture, the platform delivers identity security at enterprise scale.

🔐

Identity Governance

Automate identity lifecycle management, access certifications, and role management across the enterprise.

  • • Automated provisioning/deprovisioning
  • • Access certification campaigns
  • • Role-based access control (RBAC)
  • • Separation of duties enforcement
🎯

Access Management

Secure and streamline user authentication and authorization across applications and resources.

  • • Single sign-on (SSO)
  • • Multi-factor authentication (MFA)
  • • Adaptive authentication
  • • API access management
👤

Privileged Access Management

Secure, manage, and monitor privileged accounts and access to critical systems.

  • • Privileged credential vaulting
  • • Session monitoring and recording
  • • Just-in-time access provisioning
  • • Privileged task automation
📊

Identity Analytics

Leverage AI and machine learning to detect identity risks and anomalies in real-time.

  • • Peer group analysis
  • • Outlier detection
  • • Risk scoring
  • • Predictive insights

Key Capabilities

⚡ Automated Processes

SailPoint eliminates time-consuming manual identity management tasks through intelligent automation. Organizations can automatically provision and deprovision user access, conduct periodic access reviews, and enforce security policies without manual intervention. This automation reduces the burden on IT teams while improving security and compliance posture.

✅ Regulatory Compliance

The platform simplifies compliance with regulations like SOX, GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS through comprehensive audit trails, automated access certifications, and separation of duties controls. SailPoint provides the visibility and documentation needed to demonstrate compliance during audits and reduces the risk of violations.

🚀 Faster Onboarding

New employees can be productive from day one with automated provisioning that grants appropriate access based on role, department, and location. SailPoint's identity lifecycle management ensures staff have the right access at the right time, while also automatically removing access when employees change roles or leave the organization.

🔍 Risk Mitigation

Advanced analytics and AI-powered insights help identify risky access patterns, excessive permissions, and potential security threats before they become incidents. SailPoint's risk-based approach prioritizes remediation efforts on the most critical vulnerabilities, enabling security teams to work more efficiently.

Customer Impact & Results

Fortune 500 Trust

Approximately 50% of Fortune 500 companies rely on SailPoint to secure their digital identities and meet their identity governance requirements. This includes organizations across financial services, healthcare, retail, manufacturing, and technology sectors.

SailPoint customers have achieved significant business outcomes through the platform:

⏱️ Time Savings

Reduced time spent on access certifications by up to 75% through automation and intelligent recommendations.

💰 Cost Reduction

Lower operational costs by eliminating manual processes and reducing the need for custom identity integrations.

🔒 Security Improvement

Dramatically reduced attack surface by identifying and remediating excessive access and orphaned accounts.

📈 Audit Success

Simplified audit processes with comprehensive reporting and documentation of identity controls.

Careers at SailPoint

🚀 Open Positions: 138+ Roles

SailPoint is hiring across multiple functions and locations, with significant opportunities in engineering, product, sales, and customer success. The company offers a collaborative, innovative culture where team members can make a direct impact on enterprise security.

Engineering & Technical Roles

Software Engineers

Build and enhance the SailPoint Identity Security Cloud platform using modern technologies and cloud-native architectures. Work on features that impact millions of identities.

Security Engineers

Design and implement security controls, conduct security assessments, and ensure the platform meets the highest security standards required by enterprise customers.

Data Scientists & ML Engineers

Develop AI and machine learning models to enhance identity analytics, risk scoring, and intelligent automation capabilities.

Why Join SailPoint?

  • ✓ Work on enterprise-scale identity security challenges
  • ✓ Collaborate with Fortune 500 customers
  • ✓ Competitive compensation and benefits
  • ✓ Global company with strong Austin presence
  • ✓ Innovative culture focused on continuous learning
  • ✓ Make a real impact on cybersecurity

Technology & Innovation

SailPoint's platform leverages modern cloud technologies, microservices architecture, and advanced AI/ML capabilities to deliver identity security at scale. The company continues to invest in R&D to stay ahead of evolving identity threats and customer needs.

☁️ Cloud-Native

Built on modern cloud infrastructure for scalability, reliability, and global deployment.

🤖 AI-Powered

Machine learning models drive intelligent automation and predictive identity insights.

🔌 Integration-Rich

Connects with hundreds of applications, directories, and IT systems out of the box.

Join SailPoint's Mission

Help secure digital identities for the world's leading enterprises
